hero.title: Simulate anything, for $1
hero.descriptionPart1: Drop in anything — a press release, a news headline, a policy draft, a question you can't answer, a historical what-if — and
hero.descriptionPart3: that react to it hour by hour. Posting, arguing, trading, changing their minds.
hero.slogan: Don't predict the future. Simulate it

panel.readyDesc: First simulation in ~10 min, ~$1 on the Cheap preset. Drop in a doc or pick a trending headline to start.

s1.title: You bring a scenario
s1.desc: MiroShark builds the world around it — extracts actors, stakes, and open questions from your input.

s2.title: Hundreds of grounded agents
s2.desc: React on Twitter, Reddit, and a prediction market. Hour by hour, round after round.

s3.title: Steer the timeline
s3.desc: Chat with any agent. Drop breaking news mid-run. Fork a counterfactual and watch it diverge.

s4.title: Get a report
s4.desc: A Substack-style write-up of what happened, citing actual posts and trades from the run.

console.uploadHint: or click to browse the file system

console.askPlaceholder: e.g. Will the EU AI Act's biometrics clause survive the final trilogue?
